spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (Fire error event instead of throwing for CSP blocked worker) and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive controls drive the page (2 buttons, 0 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges, 2 listeners) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces multiple failure / unsupported / edge-case branches in the UI, not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Page cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/5177205656911872 self-heal link (CLAUDE.md rule 3).

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: 'SharedWorker CSP Lab' is a solid concept page: interactive surface lands, references are in place, and the design system rules hold. The follow-ups in openQuestions are polish, not blockers.
